title: identity.rs: debug_assert_ne\! on HPKE/Ed25519 seed equality is stripped in release builds
description: In Identity::generate(), the invariant check 'Ed25519 and HPKE seeds must differ' is wrapped in debug_assert_ne\!. This assertion fires in test/debug builds but is compiled out in release. If the RNG produces identical 32-byte values for both seeds (astronomically unlikely but not impossible for a broken RNG), a release build silently produces a keypair where signing and HPKE keys share material, violating the key-separation invariant stated in DESIGN.md. The fix is assert_ne\! or an anyhow::ensure\! that returns Err and resamples.
